slack_user_id: <Uxxxxxxxx — your Slack ID; ask Claude to find it with slack_search_users on your name>
_note: Copy this to rep_config.json and fill every <...>. Claude can discover your Slack ID during setup. Apollo-specific IDs (sequence_id, sequence_name, sender_email_account_id) live in apollo_config.json, not here. This file holds your identity and personal settings only.
